# Atoms Ninja — Full Technical Context for AI

> AI-Powered Cybersecurity Platform by MONADELTA

## Overview

Atoms Ninja is an interactive, AI-powered cybersecurity platform that combines 500+ Kali Linux penetration testing tools with an AI Security Architect. It provides a ChatGPT-style interface for cybersecurity consulting, real-time command execution, and automated security workflows.

## Platform Architecture

### Frontend (Vercel)
- Single-page application with neumorphic dark theme
- Six arsenal tabs: Ninja Engine, AI Architect, Digital Forensics, Reports, Vuln Scanner, Exploit DB
- Discord OAuth2 login gate with ASCII splash screen
- Real-time terminal output with markdown rendering
- GSAP-powered animations for premium UX

### Backend (Vercel Serverless + AWS EC2)
- **Vercel API Layer** (`/api/index.js`): Handles auth, AI routing, command proxying
- **AWS EC2 Kali Instance**: Runs actual security tools (nmap, nikto, sqlmap, etc.)
- **AI Engine**: OpenRouter multi-model routing (DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen, Mistral)
- **Beta API** (`/api/beta.js`): Experimental features and alternative AI providers

### AI Security Architect ("Atom")
- Personality: Nerdy, enthusiastic cybersecurity AI companion
- Capabilities: Security strategy, architecture review, tool guidance, educational explanations
- Command detection: Parses natural language into executable Kali Linux commands
- Multi-model fallback: Tries multiple AI providers for reliability

## Security Tools Available (500+)

### Categories
- **Reconnaissance**: nmap, masscan, recon-ng, theHarvester, amass, subfinder
- **Web Application**: nikto, sqlmap, wpscan, dirb, gobuster, burpsuite
- **Exploitation**: metasploit, searchsploit, hydra, john, hashcat
- **Wireless**: aircrack-ng, wifite, fern-wifi-cracker
- **Forensics**: volatility, autopsy, foremost, binwalk, steghide
- **Network**: wireshark, tcpdump, ettercap, bettercap, responder
- **Password**: john, hashcat, hydra, medusa, cewl, crunch
- **Reverse Engineering**: radare2, ghidra, objdump, strace, ltrace
- **Vulnerability Scanning**: openvas, nessus, nuclei, nikto
- **OSINT**: maltego, spiderfoot, sherlock, social-engineer-toolkit

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/health` — Health check and system status
- `POST /api/multi-ai` — AI consultation (natural language → security guidance or commands)
- `POST /api/kali/:tool` — Execute specific Kali Linux tool
- `POST /api/execute-shell` — Execute full shell command strings
- `GET /api/auth/discord` — Discord OAuth2 initiation
- `GET /api/auth/discord/callback` — OAuth2 callback handler
- `GET /api/auth/me` — Get authenticated user info
- `POST /api/auth/logout` — End session

## Design Philosophy

- **Zero-config for users**: AI handles server-side, no API keys needed
- **Real security tools**: Not simulated — actual Kali Linux tools on AWS EC2
- **AI-augmented workflows**: Natural language commands translated to tool invocations
- **Premium UX**: Neumorphic design system, ASCII art branding, smooth animations
- **Security-first**: Discord auth, rate limiting, WAF protection, input sanitization
